title: Tolum Harous

{{Quote|Any work he is doing on behalf of the Imperials should be investigated thoroughly.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]], on Tolum Harous|<ref name="air" />}}
'''Tolum Harous''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] working for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] during the times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] from the aquatic world of [[Adamastor]], Harous always loved both the oceans and knowledge. He was a classmate of [[Bevel Lemelisk]] during his youth. He became a man of extensive education, with multiple honorary degrees from technical institutes.<ref name="air" />

He began working for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] around [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], with a quality work. He was honored by the Imperial scientific community many times. Companies such as [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] and [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] offered him huge sums of money to join them, but he was happy with Hydrospeare.<ref name="air" />

A member of elite [[Design Team Beta]] under its leader, Dr. [[Plo Smarx]], Harous tended to scrap a "more than acceptable" project if he ever thought it could be improved. Most of Beta's projects included the development of aquatic weapons and vehicles for the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].<ref name="air" />

Harous later became the leader of Design Team Beta when Dr. Smarx was arrested by the Empire around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Harous and his cohorts, [[Mosara Thiirn]], [[Sere Lure]], and [[Diran Miciluz]], had since developed and managed some of the best multi-environment ships used by the Empire.<ref name="air" />

Harous almost rejected the [[Explorer Submergible]] because he wanted to fulfill the impossible specifications required by the Empire. The other Design Team Beta members convinced him to release the vehicle.<ref name="air" />

A short, light-skinned, white-haired man, he always had an immaculate look, with the office in perfect order and the coats freshly pressed thanks to his tailor droid, the new [[TL-4]] model. He was considered pleasant to work with and an inspiration. He even learned [[Sluissese]] so that Dr. Lure was more comfortable working with him.<ref name="air" />

Rebel General [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] admired the quality of his work, and considered that any of his designs would be dangerous in Imperial hands. Rebel Lieutenant [[Akul Witig]], a native of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], however, noticed that the Rebel Alliance had no information on Harous's political beliefs, and suggested to test his loyalties and, depending on the answer, recruit him to put him to work on Dac.<ref name="air" />

==Sources==
